title: Baker Ross E1144 Blank Plastic Face Masks — Decorate Your Own Mask is Ideal Accessory for Halloween Costumes, Fancy Dress, Parties and More, Plain White (Pack of 6), 20cm x 15cm
features: Customisable Masks: These white, plastic masks are perfect for getting in character. Easy to paint and customise, kids will love the opportunity to be creative.
Durable: Made with a smooth surface for easy decorating. Comes with elastic for a versatile and snug fit on children; measures 20cm x 15cm.
Personalise and Customise: Use craft supplies, such as acrylic paints, stickers, paint, glitter, feathers, markers, and more to create your own look.
Costume Accessory: Dress up, play, or accessorise with these unique masks. Ideal for parties, masquerade balls, gatherings, trick or treat, classrooms, unisex fancy dress for boys and girls and more.

Safety First: All Baker Ross toys and crafts satisfy stringent European Community Safety Laws, and carry the CE mark. Baker Ross caters to a variety of ages and leaves it to customers to assess whether a child is old enough for any particular item.
description: Product Description Co-founded in 1974 by Patti Baker, Baker Ross is still a family owned and run business whose innovative ideas have led us to become one of the leading suppliers of arts & crafts to schools, playgroups and organisations in the UK. We employ over 80 dedicated and hard working staff located at our office and warehouse in Harlow, Essex. Baker Ross has been importing and distributing arts and crafts, educational and fundraising products to schools, playgroups, charities etc. in the UK and abroad by mail order since it started, and now supply thousands of different organisations every year. We currently offer over 3,000 items through our website and catalogues. Baker Ross supports ChildLine, Clic Sargent and PDSA by giving a generous lump sum donation. Halloween is just around the corner, why not get ready for the season with our spooky makes! Whether you're prepping for a Halloween party, decorating the front porch for trick-or-treaters, or just making crafts for the fun of it, these simple DIY ideas will fill your fall weekends with all kinds of crafty entertainment. Baker Ross Spooky Eyes Chocolates (Pack of 10) Baker Ross Stretchy Spiders (Pack of 12) Baker Ross Halloween Scratch Art Pictures (Pack of 6) Baker Ross Halloween Colour In Window Decorations (Pack of 12) Baker Ross Halloween Treat Bag Kits (Pack of 4) Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 928 — — — — Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — no data — no data — no data — no data
